source_pr.title: session: optimizate the session package
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Only evidence is a comment warning about a potential data race; no concrete flaky failure signature is captured.
failure_signature: Comment-only signal about a potential data race (no concrete failure signature)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch only contains comment changes mentioning "it will cause data race" and broader refactors of session tests/utilities. There is no concrete flaky failure signature or an identifiable targeted stabilization/race-fix change tied to a specific flaky symptom. Keep as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Comment-only / refactor-style PR without a concrete failure signature or targeted stabilization fix; keep as insufficient evidence.

evidence: evidence: -// 2. Don't use createStoreAndBootstrap and BootstrapSession together. It will cause data race.

files: session/BUILD.bazel, session/bootstrap_test.go, session/bootstraptest/BUILD.bazel, session/bootstraptest/bootstrap_upgrade_test.go, session/clusteredindextest/BUILD.bazel, session/clusteredindextest/clustered_index_test.go, session/clusteredindextest/main_test.go, session/clusteredindextest/testdata/clustered_index_suite_in.json, session/clusteredindextest/testdata/clustered_index_suite_out.json, session/index_usage_sync_lease_test.go, session/internal/BUILD.bazel, session/internal/testkit.go, session/main_test.go, session/testutil.go, session/tidb_test.go

analysis:

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
